items.description: Deploy stealthy reverse shells using advanced process hollowing with GhostStrike – a C++ tool for ethical hacking and Red Team operations.

items.name: KittyLoader
items.description: KittyLoader is a highly evasive loader written in C / Assembly

items.name: NovaHypervisor
items.description: NovaHypervisor is a defensive x64 Intel host based hypervisor. The goal of this project is to protect against kernel based attacks (either via Bring Your Own Vulnerable Driver (BYOVD) or other means) by safeguarding defense products (AntiVirus / Endpoint Protection) and kernel memory structures and preventing unauthorized access to kernel memory.

items.name: Jormungandr
items.description: Jormungandr is a kernel implementation of a COFF loader, allowing kernel developers to load and execute their COFFs in the kernel.

items.name: project-starbeam
items.description: The Ultimate ESP32 Jammer w/ 5 Radios.  #RIPflipper -- V2 OUT NOW

items.name: wge
items.description: A high-performance web application firewall (WAF) library based on C++

items.name: ARPoLAN
items.description: A tool for network scanning and ARP spoofing using the Atmega32u4 and W5500

items.name: LQZ
items.description: 灵取证是一款功能强大且专业的安卓设备数据取证工具，专门为执法部门、司法机构和安全调查人员设计开发。本工具采用先进的取证技术，确保数据提取过程的完整性和准确性。本工具的开发和使用严格遵循相关法律法规框架，确保所有数据提取操作都在合法授权范围内进行。通过专业的数据处理流程，为执法调查工作提供可靠的电子证据支持。

items.name: DV_NEW
items.description: This is the combination of multiple evasion techniques to evade defenses. (Dirty Vanity)
